Amazing product, congrats on the launch!! Love that the UI is non-invasive. What is your favorite site to use it on?

Report

Michael Yagudaev

Maker

@teddyni Thanks so much 😊. Top two would be: Github and Reddit. Not having to read long discussions is such a relief. I've even used it on StackOverflow to find out should I use "webpage" or "web page" in marketing copy. Got it to work on PDFs recently (still need to fix for local PDFs but remote ones work), so papers about AI would be great too.
